about.title: Nge-Sinqobile Construction
about.subtitle: Umlingani Wakho Othembekile Wokwakha eGauteng
about.heroSubtitle: Sakha ukwethembana, iphrojekthi eyodwa ngesikhathi kuyo yonke iGauteng Province

story.title: Indaba Yethu
story.content: Yasungulwa ngu-Dingwayo Reason Ndlovu, i-Sinqobile Construction isebenzele umphakathi waseGauteng iminyaka engaphezu kwe-15. Okwaqala njengephrojekthi encane yokwakha sekukhule kwaba elinye lamagama athembekile kakhulu ekwakheni kwamakhaya nezebhizinisi kuyo yonke iJohannesburg, iPretoria, nezindawo ezizungezile.

mission.title: Inhloso Yethu
mission.content: Ukuhlinzeka ngezinsiza zokwakha eziyingqayizivele ezedlula okulindelwe amakhasimende ethu kuyilapho sigcina amazinga aphezulu ekhwalithi, ukuphepha, nobungcweti. Sikholelwa ekwakheni ubudlelwano obuzophepha ngokuxhumana okungobuqotho nomsebenzi ongcono.

items.title: Ikhwalithi Kuqala
items.description: Asikaze senze isivumelwano ngekhwalithi. Yonke iphrojekthi ithola ukunakwa kwethu okuphelele kwimininingwane nokuzibophezela ekubeni ngcono.

items.title: Ukuthembeka
items.description: Amakhasimende ethu angathembela kithi ukuthi sizoletha amaphrojekthi ngesikhathi nangaphakathi kwesabelomali, njalo.

items.title: Ubuqotho
items.description: Amanani angobuqotho, ukuxhumana okucacile, nezindlela zebhizinisi ezinomthetho kuholela konke esikwenzayo.

items.title: Ukuphepha
items.description: Sigcina amazinga aphezulu okuphepha ukuvikela iqembu lethu, amakhasimende, nezakhiwo zawo.

experience.title: Kungani Ukhethe i-Sinqobile Construction?
items: Sisebenzela zonke izindawo kuyo yonke iGauteng

benefits.title: Izintengo Ezinembile

benefits.title: Akukho Sibopho

benefits.title: Kusekelwe Kochwepheshe
benefits.description: Izibalo ezivela eminyakeni eyi-15+ yolwazi lokwakha

accurateQuote.title: Thola Intengo Enembile
accurateQuote.description: Nakuba isibali sethu sinikeza isilinganiso esithembekile, iphrojekthi ngayinye iyingqayizivele. Ukuze uthole izintengo ezinembile kakhulu ezilungiselelwe izidingo zakho ezithile, sincoma ukucela intengo enemininingwane. Iqembu lethu lizokwenza:
benefits: Vakashela indawo yakho ukuze kuhlolwe kahle
Nikeza ukwahlukaniswa okwemininingwane kwazo zonke izindleko

cta.title: Usukulungele Ukuqala Iphrojekthi Yakho?
cta.subtitle: Thola intengo enemininingwane, enembile kusuka eqenjini lethu elinolwazi

calculator.noteText: Lesi yisilinganiso esisekelwe kumaphrojekthi avamile. Izindleko zokugcina zingahluka kuye ngezidingo ezithile, izinto, nezimo zendawo.

serviceAreas.title: Izindawo Zensiza

serviceAreas.notListed: Awuboni indawo yakho ohlwini? Sixhumane - singase sikwazi ukusiza!

faq.title: Imibuzo Ebuzwa Njalo
faq.subtitle: Imibuzo Evamile Ngezinsiza Zethu Zokwakha
faq.heroSubtitle: Thola izimpendulo zemibuzo evame ukubuzwa ngezinsiza zethu

items.question: Ninikeza izintengo zamahhala?
items.answer: Yebo, sinikeza izintengo zamahhala, ezingenasibopho kuzo zonke izinsiza zethu. Sixhumane nje nathi ngemininingwane yephrojekthi yakho futhi sizobeka isikhathi esifanele sokuhlola izidingo zakho.

items.question: Yiziphi izindawo enizisebenzela?
items.answer: Sisebenzela zonke izindawo kuyo yonke iGauteng Province, kufaka phakathi iJohannesburg, iPretoria, iEast Rand, iWest Rand, nezindawo ezizungezile. Sixhumane nathi ukuze siqinisekise ukumbozwa kwendawo yakho ethile.

items.question: Ninezitifiketi futhi ninenshuwarensi?
items.answer: Yebo, i-Sinqobile Construction inezitifiketi ezigcwele futhi inenshuwarensi. Siphatha inshuwarensi yesibopho esiphelele ukuvikela kokubili amakhasimende ethu neqembu lethu ngesikhathi sawo wonke amaphrojekthi.

items.question: Amaphrojekthi athatha isikhathi esingakanani ngokuvamile?
items.answer: Izikhathi zamaphrojekthi ziyahluka kuye ngokubanzi nobunkimbinkimbi. Ukulungisa okuncane kungathatha izinsuku ezi-1-2, kuyilapho amaphrojekthi amakhulu okwakha angathatha amasonto ambalwa. Sinikeza izikhathi ezinemininingwane ngentengo ngayinye.

items.question: Yiziphi izindlela zokukhokha enizamukelayo?
items.answer: Samukela imali, ukudluliswa kwemali yasebhange, nezinkokhelo zamakhadi. Kumaphrojekthi amakhulu, sivame ukudinga idiphozithi ukuze siqale umsebenzi, futhi ibhalansi ikhokhelwa lapho umsebenzi uqediwe.

items.question: Ninikeza iziqinisekiso emsebenzini wenu?
items.answer: Yebo, sima ngemuva komsebenzi wethu ngeziqinisekiso eziphelele. Izikhathi zesiqinisekiso ziyahluka ngohlobo lwensiza, futhi sizonikezela ngemininingwane ephelele yesiqinisekiso ngentengo yakho.

items.question: Ninikeza izinto noma kufanele ngizithenga?
items.answer: Singanikezela zonke izinto njengengxenye yensiza yethu, noma sisebenze ngezinto ozithenga wena. Sizoneluleka ngendlela engcono kakhulu ngokusekelwe ephrojekthini yakho nasesabelweni sakho semali.

items.question: Ningasebenza ngempelasonto noma ntambama?
items.answer: Yebo, sinikeza ukuhlelwa kwesikhathi okuguquguqukayo okufaka phakathi umsebenzi wempelasonto nentambama kumaphrojekthi aphuthumayo noma ukwaneliseka kwekhasimende. Izindleko ezengeziwe zingasebenza emsebenzini wangemuva kwamahora.

items.question: Niphatha ukulungiswa kwezimo eziphuthumayo?
items.answer: Yebo, sinikeza izinsiza zokulungisa eziphuthumayo ze-24/7 zezinkinga eziphuthumayo ezifana namapayipi aphukile, izinkinga zikagesi, noma umonakalo wesakhiwo. Sixhumane ngokushesha ukuze uthole usizo lwesimo esiphuthumayo.

blog.title: Imininingwane Yokwakha Namathiphu
blog.subtitle: Izeluleko zobuchwepheshe, imihlahlandlela, nemininingwane yemboni kusuka ku-Sinqobile Construction. Funda ngezindleko zokwakha, imibono yokuvuselela, imithetho yokwakha, nokunye.
blog.noResults: Azikho izindatshana ezitholakele ezihambisana nezidingo zakho. Zama ukulungisa ukusesha kwakho noma izihlungi.
blog.ctaSubtitle: Iqembu lethu e-Sinqobile Construction lilapha ukusiza ngephrojekthi yakho yokwakha. Thola ukubonisana kwamahhala nentengo namuhla.

serviceAreas.title: Sisebenzela Zonke Izindawo ZaseGauteng
serviceAreas.description: Kusukela eJohannesburg kuya ePretoria, iEast Rand kuya eWest Rand - siletha izinsiza zokwakha ezikhwalithile emnyango wakho.

finalCTA.title: Usukulungele Ukuqala Iphrojekthi Yakho?
finalCTA.description: Xhumana ne-Sinqobile Construction namuhla ukuze uthole ukubonisana kwamahhala nentengo. Ake sakhe okuthile okukhulu ndawonye!

about.title: Ngo-Dingwayo Reason Ndlovu
about.description: Enamava angaphezu kweminyaka eyi-15 embonini yokwakha, u-Dingwayo Reason Ndlovu wakhe igama lokusebenza kahle nokusebenza okuthembekile kuyo yonke iGauteng.
about.experience: Kusukela ekulungiseni amakhaya amancane kuya emiphakathini emikhulu yokwakha, sinikeza imiphumela eyingqayizivele ehlala isikhathi eside.

whyChooseUs.title: Kungani Ukhethe i-Sinqobile Construction Ephrojekthini Yakho Yokwakha?
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Izinsiza zokwakha ezinobuchwepheshe eGauteng ezinolwazi oluqinisekisiwe ekwakheni, ukuvuselela, ukuphenda, ukupenda, ukwendlala amatshe, ukubeka amathayela, izinsiza zamanzi, nokunye. Nansi indlela abanikazi bezakhiwo kuyo yonke iJohannesburg, iPretoria, neSandton bethemba i-Sinqobile Construction:

experience.title: Iminyaka eyi-15+ Yolwazi
experience.description: Ngaphezu kweminyaka eyi-15 yolwazi lokwakha okungobuchwepheshe sisebenzela iGauteng. Siqedile amaphrojekthi angu-500+ aphumelelayo kuyo yonke iJohannesburg, iPretoria, iSandton, nezindawo ezizungezile.

licensed.title: Kunesitifiketi Esigcwele Futhi Kunenshuwarensi
licensed.description: Kubhalisiwe ku-NHBRC futhi kunenshuwarensi ephelele enokumbozwa kwesibopho esiphelele. Impahla yakho nokutshala kwakho imali kuvikelekile kuwo wonke amaphrojekthi esiwenzayo.

quality.title: Umsebenzi Wekhwalithi Uqinisekisiwe
quality.description: Sima ngemuva komsebenzi wethu ngeziqinisekiso eziphelele. Yonke iphrojekthi ihlangabezana namazinga aphezulu ekhwalithi, kusukela ekuphendeni nasekupendeni kuya ekuvuseleleni kwamakhaya okuphelele.

team.title: Iqembu Elinobuchwepheshe Elinochwepheshe
team.description: Ochwepheshe bethu bokwakha abanesitifiketi bachwepheshe ekwakheni, ukubeka amathayela, ukwendlala amatshe, izinsiza zamanzi, uphahla, nokuvimbela amanzi. Izingcweti ezizibophezele ekubeni ngcono.

onTime.title: Ukulethwa Kwephrojekthi Ngesikhathi
onTime.description: Siyahlonipha isikhathi sakho nesabelomali sakho. Amaphrojekthi aqedwa ngesikhathi ngamanani acacile futhi ngaphandle kwezindleko ezifihlekile. Imali yokushayela engu-R400 yokubonisana nezintengo.

allAreas.title: Sisebenzela Zonke Izindawo ZaseGauteng
allAreas.description: Kusukela eJohannesburg CBD kuya eSandton, ePretoria kuya eCenturion, eMidrand kuya eFourways - sinikeza izinsiza zokwakha ezinobuchwepheshe kuzo zonke izindawo zaseGauteng.

rating.title: Isilinganiso Sekhasimende esingungu-4.9★
rating.description: Kulinganiswe izinkanyezi ezi-4.9 ngamakhasimende anelisekile. Funda ukubuyekezwa kwethu kwe-Google ukuze ubone ukuthi kungani abanikazi bamakhaya namabhizinisi bethemba i-Sinqobile Construction ngezidingo zabo zokwakha.

emergency.title: Izinsiza Zokusiza 24/7
emergency.description: Izinsiza zokwakha eziphuthumayo ziyatholakala zokulungisa okuphuthumayo okufaka phakathi amapayipi aphukile, izinkinga zikagesi, ukuvuza kophahla, nomonakalo wesakhiwo. Shayela u-+27 82 868 8396 noma +27 81 569 2985 noma nini.

whyChooseUs.comprehensiveTitle: Izinsiza Zokwakha Eziphelele Kuyo Yonke iGauteng

comprehensiveContent.para1: I-Sinqobile Construction ingumlingani wakho wokwakha othembekile osebenzela zonke izindawo zaseGauteng Province. Noma udinga abakhi eJohannesburg, ochwepheshe bokuvuselela eSandton, noma izinsiza zokwakha ePretoria, iqembu lethu elinolwazi liletha imiphumela eyingqayizivele.
comprehensiveContent.para2: Izinsiza zethu eziphelele zifaka phakathi ukwakha kwamakhaya, ukwakha okwezebhizinisi, ukuvuselela kwamakhaya, ukuphenda nokupenda, ukwendlala amatshe nezindlela zemoto, izinsiza zamathayela, ukufakwa kwamanzi nokulungiswa, uphahla nokuvimbela amanzi, nokunakekelwa okujwayelekile.
comprehensiveContent.para3: Ngeminyaka eyi-15+ yolwazi lokwakha namaphrojekthi angu-500+ aqediwe, sakhe igama lomsebenzi wekhwalithi, insiza ethembekile, namanani ancintisanayo. Isilinganiso sethu sekhasimende esingungu-4.9-star sibonisa ukuzibophezela kwethu ekuneliseni kwekhasimende.
comprehensiveContent.para4: Sisebenzela amakhasimende akhaya nezebhizinisi eJohannesburg, eSandton, ePretoria, eCenturion, eMidrand, eRandburg, eFourways, eRoodepoort, nakuzo zonke izindawo ezizungezile zaseGauteng. Ulwazi lwethu lwendawo luqinisekisa ukuthi siyaqonda izidingo eziyingqayizivele zokwakha zendawo ngayinye.
comprehensiveContent.para5: Izintengo zamahhala ziyatholakala ngemali yokushayela engu-R400 ecacile yokubonisana. Sixhumane ku-+27 82 868 8396 noma +27 81 569 2985 ukuze sixoxe ngephrojekthi yakho yokwakha. Sinesitifiketi esigcwele, sibhalisiwe ku-NHBRC, futhi sinenshuwarensi ephelele ukuze uphile ngokuthula kwengqondo.

items.text: U-Meshack neqembu lakhe benze umsebenzi omuhle kakhulu ekuvuseleni ikhishi lethu. Abangobuchwepheshe, abathembekile, futhi banakekela imininingwane.
items.name: Sarah Johnson

items.text: Umsebenzi omangalisayo wokwendlala amatshe endleleni yethu yemoto. Waqedwa ngesikhathi futhi ngaphakathi kwesabelomali. Kunconywa kakhulu!
items.name: David Smith

items.text: Umsebenzi wokuphenda wawuphelele. Uhlanzekile, ungobuchwepheshe, futhi ikhwalithi yokuqeda yadlula okulindelwe yithi.
items.name: Maria Gonzalez

beforeAfter.title: Bona Ukuguquka
beforeAfter.subtitle: Hudula isilaydha ukuze ubone imiphumela emangalisayo yaphambili nangemuva yamaphrojekthi ethu okwakha

beforeAfter.ctaText: Ake siguqule indawo yakho ngezinsiza zethu zokwakha ezinobuchwepheshe. Thola intengo yamahhala namuhla!

videoTestimonials.title: Lalela Kumakhasimende Ethu Anelisekile
videoTestimonials.subtitle: Bukela ubufakazi bangempela obuvela kumakhasimende anelisekile abathembe i-Sinqobile Construction ngamaphrojekthi abo okwakha
videoTestimonials.cta: Usukulungele ukuqala iphrojekthi yakho? Joyina amakhasimende ethu anelisekile namuhla!

timeline.title: Inqubo Yethu Yokwakha
timeline.subtitle: Indlela ecacile, yezinyathelo ngezinyathelo yokuletha iphrojekthi yakho ekuphileni
timeline.ctaText: Iqembu lethu elinolwazi lilungele ukukuholela kuzo zonke izinyathelo zenqubo yokwakha
